metals.name: Aged Iron (The Mortal Bone)
metals.description: Standard iron mined from deep within the earth. Heavy, rustic, and resilient.
metals.lore: Considered the bone of the earth, Aged Iron is highly receptive to defensive blessings. It absorbs impact exceptionally well, making it the perfect metal for parrying shields and heavy swords.

metals.name: Crucible Steel (The Refined Soul)
metals.description: High-carbon steel smelted in specialized clay crucibles using crushed bone ash.
metals.lore: Crucible Steel is exceptionally sharp and holds its edge under extreme conditions. It vibrates with high-frequency energy, allowing it to slip through gaps in plate armor to expose the soft flesh beneath.

metals.name: Quicksilver Bronze (The Mercurial Flow)
metals.description: An alchemical alloy of copper, tin, and purified quicksilver.
metals.lore: Lighter than standard steel, Quicksilver Bronze feels almost weightless in the hand. It has a mercurial property that responds to the wielder's intent, accelerating strikes and assisting with rapid anatomical target adjustments.

metals.name: Blood-Iron (The Sanguine Ore)
metals.description: A dark, reddish iron ore mined from soils saturated with ancient blood.
metals.lore: Naturally porous and warm to the touch, Blood-Iron is thirsty. It draws in the blood of those it cuts, transferring a portion of the victim's vitality back into the wielder. It makes lacerations difficult to clot, ensuring deep, continuous bleeding.

metals.name: Meteoric Vitrite (The Star-Glass)
metals.description: A rare, crystalline obsidian-like substance harvested from fallen meteors.
metals.lore: Brittle but incredibly sharp, Meteoric Vitrite cuts through physical matter at a molecular level. It is highly receptive to moon-blessings and is the weapon of choice for executing wounded foes instantly.

god_blessings.name: Sol-Vitruvius's Aegis
god_blessings.description: Reduces the stamina cost of parrying by 30%. On a successful parry, reflects a shockwave that deals physical damage equal to the enemy's strength.
god_blessings.lore: The Prime Architect demands symmetry; when you are struck, the blow must be returned in perfect mathematical balance.

god_blessings.name: Anima-Ouroboros's Hunger
god_blessings.description: Bleeding stacks applied by the weapon deal 25% more damage. When an enemy suffers from max bleed stacks, the wielder absorbs their stamina upon each tick.
god_blessings.lore: The Serpent must be fed. What flows from the enemy must sustain the circle of your own life.

god_blessings.name: Nocturna-Luna's Gaze
god_blessings.description: Increases Critical Hit Chance by 15% when locked onto a specific target. Critical hits ignore 50% of the target's physical armor.
god_blessings.lore: The Stitched Maiden guides the edge to the exact suture of the flesh, revealing the hidden paths of mortality.

god_blessings.name: Vulkan-Ferrum's Fury
god_blessings.description: Increases stun duration on heavy attacks by 1 turn. If a target is executed (killed), all remaining enemies on the field are slow-debuffed by the sheer impact.
god_blessings.lore: The Lord of the Deep Crucible strikes with the weight of the mountain, shattering the resolve of all who witness his forge.

perks_and_abilities.name: Parry
perks_and_abilities.mechanics: A defensive technique where the player uses their weapon to redirect an incoming melee strike. Successful execution negates damage and creates a counterattack window.
perks_and_abilities.metal_influence: When forged with Crucible Steel, a parry has a 20% chance to disarm the attacker. When forged with Aged Iron, it restores 10 stamina.
perks_and_abilities.god_influence: Sol-Vitruvius's Aegis turns a basic parry into a kinetic reflection, sending physical damage back to the attacker.

perks_and_abilities.name: Bleed
perks_and_abilities.mechanics: An offensive status effect that deals physical damage over time (DoT) at the end of each turn, stacking up to 5 times.
perks_and_abilities.metal_influence: Blood-Iron weapons apply 2 stacks of bleed per critical hit. Quicksilver Bronze applies a bleed stack that also reduces target evasion.
perks_and_abilities.god_influence: Anima-Ouroboros's Hunger turns bleed ticks into stamina siphon, keeping the wielder fully energized.

perks_and_abilities.name: Execute
perks_and_abilities.mechanics: A devastating finishing move that deals massive multiplier damage (x3.0) to targets under 30% health or those with active bleed/stun states.
perks_and_abilities.metal_influence: Meteoric Vitrite increases the execution threshold to 40% health. Crucible Steel execute strikes ignore armor entirely.
perks_and_abilities.god_influence: Vulkan-Ferrum's Fury triggers a concussive shockwave upon a successful execute, slowing or stunning neighboring enemies.

perks_and_abilities.name: Lock-On
perks_and_abilities.mechanics: A targeting ability that focuses all subsequent attacks on a single enemy or a specific anatomical part of the enemy (e.g. Head, Chest, Leg).
perks_and_abilities.metal_influence: Quicksilver Bronze reduces the AP cost of locking on to 0. Meteoric Vitrite increases critical damage by 20% against the locked-on target.
perks_and_abilities.god_influence: Nocturna-Luna's Gaze adds a permanent 'Exposed' state to the locked-on target, reducing their evasion to zero.
